headline: Dow Jones Futures: Oil Prices Rise, Palo Alto Falls On Earnings; New Trump Tariffs Coming
summary: Oil prices rose overnight while Palo Alto fell despite strong earnings. New Trump tariffs loom. AI and metals led stocks Tuesday.

headline: Dow Jones Futures:, Palo Alto Reverses Lower On Earnings; Google Tests Support
summary: The stock market hit new highs, extending a win streak. AI and metals led while Google tested support. Palo Alto earnings beat late.
